# DGSDK - Dongguan Shidike Automation Equipment Co., Ltd.

> DGSDK manufactures static elimination systems, industrial cleaning machines, precision CNC machined parts, and automation equipment for electronics, SMT, optical film, and display manufacturing industries.

## Products

- [Static Elimination Systems](https://www.dg-sdk.com/products/static-eliminator): Ionizing bars, ionizing air blowers, ionizing air guns, and static control equipment for ESD-sensitive manufacturing.
- [Industrial Cleaning Machines](https://www.dg-sdk.com/products/cleaning-machine): Polarizer cleaners, optical film cleaners, PCB cleaners, FPC cleaners, SMT cleaners, backlight cleaners, and LCM cleaners.
- [Precision Machined Parts](https://www.dg-sdk.com/products/precision-machined-parts): CNC milled components, lathe machined shafts, bearing brackets, and custom precision parts.
- [Automation Equipment](https://www.dg-sdk.com/products/automation): Diffusion plate cleaning lines, robotic loading/unloading systems, and polarizer angle measurement instruments.

## Company

- Founded: 2013
- Location: Dongguan, Guangdong, China
- Specialization: Industrial automation and static control solutions for global manufacturers
- Contact: dgsdk2013@gmail.com | +86 13602342003
